intents.text: How can the package update when GitHub updates?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: How can i get it to update when github updates?

intents.text: Set the version to 0.1.0 and configure everything correctly.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Set ut ti 0.1.0 and set everything up right

intents.text: Change version to 0.2.0 and only publish on push events.
